chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl: Misc. Appln. No. S – 424 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3445/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on MA No.3446/2024 (S/A) 07.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Applicant Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the applicant submits that in compliance of the impugned order passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace / Additional Sessions Judge-II, Ghotki, the FIR of the private respondent has been lodged therefore, instant criminal miscellaneous application has become infructuous. Accordingly, the same is disposed of having become infructuous along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
